CustomField.description: This will indicate the Queue Member is a Role so it can be excluded form reports or counters. True=Is a Role or Territory; False= It is a user or Group/Queue
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This will indicate the Queue Member is a Role so it can be excluded form reports or counters. True=Is a Role or Territory; False= It is a user or Group/Queue
CustomField.label: fxIsRole
